meaning: n.秋海棠属的植物,秋海棠
examples: Begonia, I hope that it can die on your hand.
Many people like the flower begonia; it's an indoor plant.
Begonia: is my heart, have always been to all have never left you.
Sheet moss is a great option for wrapping small plant projects, like begonia balls.
Charles Jaros, president of the American Begonia Society, welcomes the rise of these long-marginalized charmers.
